challenge.title: Korak 1
challenge.description:
Camperbot je napravio blog stranicu za putovanje u programiranje, ali izgleda da stranica ima probleme sa pristupačnošću i lošim metodama. Vaš zadatak u ovom radionici je da popravite ove probleme za Camperbota.

Prvi skup grešaka je povezan sa korišćenjem zaglavlja delova. U početnom obuci, naučili ste da je najbolja praksa koristiti samo jedno h1 po stranici. Ali izgleda da Camperbot koristi nekoliko h1.

Pogledajte <h1>Welcome to Camperbot's Blog</h1> i promenite druge komponente od h1 u komponente za h2.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Welcome to Camperbot's Blog

Navigation

  • My Journey
  • Accessibility
  • Next Steps

My Journey Learning to Code

I started learning to code a few months ago and it's been a wild ride!

Early Challenges

At first, syntax was really confusing.

Breakthroughs

Eventually things started to click.

Accessibility Matters

Today I learned that not everyone uses the web the same way I do.

Screen Readers

These tools help visually impaired users browse websites.

What's Next?

I'm excited to dive into JavaScript and build interactive features!

Coming soon: My first JavaScript project!

Stay tuned for some exciting interactive blog features.

Contact Me

Email me at camperbot@blog.io

tests.testString:
const heading = document.querySelectorAll("h1")[0];
assert.equal(heading?.textContent, "Welcome to Camperbot's Blog");

tests.text: Unapaswa kubadilisha kipengele cha h1 chenye maandishi My Journey Learning to Code kuwa kipengele cha h2.
Unapaswa kubadilisha kipengele cha h1 chenye maandishi Accessibility Matters kuwa kipengele cha h2.
Trebalo bi da promeniš element h1 sa tekstom What's Next? u element h2.
